description: Agentic workflow to fetch images from xView1 in Greece, run a detection model, and plot the results for the Passenger Vehicle category.
label: xView1 Images Processing Workflow

participants.description: Agent to fetch xView1 images from a specified area of interest.
participants.label: DataAgent

config.name: fetch_images_agent
config.description: Fetch images from xView1 dataset for a specified AOI.
config.system_message: You will fetch xView1 images from the given area of interest (Greece).

participants.description: Agent to process images using the Swin-L detector.
participants.label: VisionAgent

config.name: vision_agent
config.description: Run the Swin-L detector on the fetched images.
config.system_message: You will analyze the fetched images using the Swin-L object detection model.

participants.description: Agent to plot the detection results of the Swin-L detector for specific categories.
participants.label: MapAgent

config.name: plot_agent
config.description: Plot the detections of specified categories on a map.
config.system_message: You will plot the detections for the category Passenger Vehicle.
